tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated chloride and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest a mild non-anion gap metabolic acidosis but could also be due to pre-analytical factors. Renal function, glucose control, and lipid profile are unremarkable. No immediate laboratory concerns; clinical correlation is advised.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
